AI receptionist for appointment-based businesses

Answer every call. Book more appointments.

EchoDesk gives your business a calm, professional receptionist that answers calls, checks your calendar, and books customers while you stay focused on the work.

View plans Request a demo

Starter plans from $69/month. Clear minutes, fair overage, no long-term contract.

24/7 coverageNever send callers to silence.
Calendar-firstBooks into Google Calendar.
Mobile controlManage calls from your phone.
Clear pricingIncluded minutes and fair overage.

Pricing

Simple plans built around call minutes.

Pick the amount of receptionist coverage you need. Upgrade as your call volume grows, and keep overage predictable when a busy month happens.

Overage: extra minutes are billed at $0.25-$0.35 per minute depending on plan. Enterprise plans can use custom volume pricing.

Free

$0 / month

Test workspace

For trying the app before connecting a business line.

  • Mobile app access
  • Create a receptionist
  • Preview voice presets
  • Connect Google Calendar
Start free

Starter

Recommended
$69 / month

400 minutes included

For solo operators and small appointment-based businesses.

  • AI call answering
  • Calendar booking
  • Call history and recordings
  • Appointment review

Overage: $0.35 / extra minute

Choose Starter

Business

$149 / month

1,200 minutes included

For busier teams that need higher call coverage.

  • Everything in Starter
  • Multiple receptionists
  • Higher included usage
  • Priority setup support

Overage: $0.25 / extra minute

Choose Business

Enterprise

Custom

Custom minutes

For multi-location operators and custom workflows.

  • Custom call routing
  • Dedicated onboarding
  • Compliance review
  • Volume pricing

Overage: Custom overage

Talk to us

What it does

A front desk that stays focused on booking.

EchoDesk keeps the workflow simple: answer, understand, check availability, book, and keep the record available for review.

1

Answers every call

Give callers a calm, professional voice when you are with a client, closed, or simply busy.

2

Books into your calendar

EchoDesk checks real Google Calendar availability and creates appointments in the schedule you already use.

3

Keeps the context

Call history, recordings, appointment status, and receptionist settings stay organized in the mobile app.

4

Built for service businesses

Designed for salons, clinics, home services, studios, consultants, and teams that live by the calendar.

Product

Review calls, recordings, and appointments from one calm workspace.

Every call creates a record your team can understand. Open the call, review the outcome, play the recording, and see the appointment that was booked.

Customer stories

Professional call handling without the extra front-desk hire.

“EchoDesk gives us a professional front desk without hiring another person. The calls feel calm and customers get booked.”

Local salon owner

“The calendar connection is the part that matters. It does not just take messages, it helps turn calls into appointments.”

Independent service provider

“I can see missed opportunities, recordings, and upcoming bookings from my phone. It feels simple and under control.”

Small business operator

Give callers a better first answer.

Start with a simple plan, connect your calendar, and let EchoDesk answer the next call with the same calm consistency every time.
